bonus_languages_note.value: Celestial, Draconic, Gnoll, Gnome, Goblin, Orc, Sylvan.

value.name: Low-Light Vision
value.description: Elves can see twice as far as humans in dim light.

value.name: Elven Immunities
value.description: Immune to magic sleep effects; +2 vs enchantment spells and effects.

value.name: Elven Magic
value.description: +2 racial bonus on caster level checks to overcome SR; +2 to Spellcraft to identify magic item properties.

value.name: Weapon Familiarity
value.description: Proficient with longbows, longswords, rapiers, and shortbows; treat any weapon with 'elven' in name as martial.
